name: softwareupdate.pending-version
title: Status Software Update Pending Version
description: A status report of the pending software update version.

payloadkeys.title: Pending software update version.
payloadkeys.content: A dictionary that contains the build and OS versions of the software update that's pending on the device.

subkeys.title: The OS version
subkeys.content: The OS version of the pending software update, including any Background Security Improvement version. This string is empty if no update is pending.

subkeys.title: The build version
subkeys.content: The build version of the pending software update, including any Background Security Improvement version. This string is empty if no update is pending.

subkeys.title: The target local date-time
subkeys.content: The local date time value that indicates when the pending software update will be installed. This key is only present when the pending software update is being enforced.
